import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(nums, n)
        nums = insert_sorted(nums, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut j = 0
while j < nums.len()
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(output)
